covered_sentences: I now decided to leave Lagado, and to go home to England.
My plan was to go to the port of MaJdonada, and to take a ship there for the island of Luggnagg.
From Luggnagg I planned to travel to Japan.
I knew that many ships went from Japan to Europe.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
单格全景，低角度仰拍，主角站于石板路中央背向镜头，面朝前方远处港口方向，前景为斑驳石砌路面，中景为破旧石砌建筑立面，后景为阴云密布的天际线，宽幅横构图。

主角双手握地图，身体微前倾，目光投向远方；无对话气泡。

拉格多街道，阴天清晨，低斜侧光从左方投射，近端破旧石柱与荒废农田边界形成前景纵深。

整体色温偏冷，灰蓝主调，建筑与路面饱和度极低，阴云天光漫射无硬阴影。

主角：棕色短发蓬松略乱，深蓝色长款翻领铜扣外套，白色衬衫领口外露，浅灰色马裤，黑色长筒皮靴；背影全身比例，约占画幅1/3高度。

covered_sentences: When I arrived at Maldonada, I learnt that the next ship for Luggnagg was expected in a month.
I spent a few days in the port of Maldonada, and the local people were very kind to me.

covered_sentences: One of them offered to take me to the little island of Glubbdubrib.
'It will amuse you,' he said, 'and it isn't far.
We can go there together, and when we come back, your ship for Luggnagg will be here.'

covered_sentences: I accepted his kind offer, because I was curious to see Glubbdubrib.

covered_sentences: When we arrived on the island, we went to the Governor's palace.
The Governor welcomed us kindly, but there was something strange about his servants.
They were not dressed in modern clothes, and they were very white and pale.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
单格全景，平视宽角，主角与总督面对面站于接待厅入口，两侧站列数名仆从，仆从服饰古旧，肤色极白苍白，铁艺烛台置于两侧，大型纹章壁炉位于背景中央，厚木门铁件铆钉可见。

总督展臂欢迎，主角微鞠躬回礼，侧方苍白仆从垂手静立，表情空洞；无对话气泡。

格鲁布度里布总督接待厅，室内夜晚或黄昏，铁艺烛台烛光为主光源，橙黄暖光投射，边角偏暗。

整体色温偏冷幽暗，烛光形成局部暖光焦点，仆从苍白肤色与暗调背景形成强对比，氛围诡异压抑。

covered_sentences: The Governor asked us to sit down, and began to question me about my adventures.
Then he clapped his hands, and the servants in the room suddenly disappeared.
One minute they were there, and the next they were gone!

He asked me if I would like to meet any famous people from history.

'They are ghosts, and they will tell you the truth.'

They live for ever.'

covered_sentences: When they are eighty years old, they are like other old men.
They forget things, and they become ill.
After the age of eighty, they lose all their friends, and they never make new friends.
'Their sufferings are terrible,' my friend said.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
单格中景，主角与朋友在前景，画面右侧或中景出现一位极度衰老的不死者，佝偻站立，身着破旧浅灰旧长袍，额头有深红色椭圆胎记，稀疏白发，深度皱纹，神情茫然空洞；朋友指向老人，表情凝重；主角望向老人，神情震惊。

朋友侧身指向老人，口中继续叙述；主角眼神直射老人，嘴唇微张；气泡："Their sufferings are terrible."，白底黑字圆角气泡挂于朋友头顶；无对话气泡在主角处。

勒格纳格王宫觐见大厅，室内，水晶烛台光，老人处光线较暗冷，前景人物受暖光照射。

整体色温冷暖对比，老人所在区域偏冷暗灰，前景两人偏暖，强调孤立与隔绝感。

covered_sentences: 'When they are ninety years old, they have no memory at all,' he continued.
'They cannot remember the names of their children.
They cannot read, because they cannot remember the words of a sentence.
After two hundred years, they cannot even speak to people.
This is because the language of the country changes, and they cannot learn the new words.'
storyboard_assets.prompt:

左格不死者翻书却无法阅读，表情空洞；右格朋友低声说完最后内容，主角已无言；气泡在右格朋友头顶："They cannot even speak to people."，白底黑字圆角气泡。

整体色调压抑冷暗，左格冷灰蓝调，右格暖光极其克制，整体情感基调沉重。

covered_sentences: This story of the Struldbruggs made me very sad.
I left Luggnagg shortly afterwards.

主角背对镜头，步伐稳定但肩膀微微下沉，透露沉重；无对话气泡。
